tweets.text: Tonight is one of your last 30 times you can see one of your best friends in your life.

tweets.text: Problems are a feature, not a bug. Problems are for the living, not for the dead. Problems are an excellent indicator that you are alive.

tweets.text: The numbers are all stupidly low. 3, 20, even 100. Peanuts.

tweets.text: Subtract the years, multiply by the times per year and look at that number. How do you feel about that number?

tweets.text: Now we are on the twice a year schedule. No more magical blizzard nights for us anymore.

tweets.text: Every year, the reporting requirements get a little broader, the penalties steeper, the restrictions on cash withdrawals more severe.

tweets.text: Being unbanked and having to rely on cash is more or less ejecting you from the modern economy.

tweets.text: You have constitutional rights. You need money to exercise them. The state acquires the power to cut off funding. What might happen next?
